items.name: surgical-anatomy
items.description: A high-fidelity 3D anatomical model optimized for mechanical analysis and surgical simulation. This repository includes source files and exported STL meshes designed for patient-specific pre-operative planning and biomechanical testing. Disclaimer: This anatomical model is for educational and research purposes only.
